---
title: Quarto Module
title-block-banner: resources/banner.png
include-back-link: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
            <meta http-equiv="refresh" content='0; URL=https://hsma.co.uk/hsma_content/modules/current_module_details/8_modern_analytics.html'></meta>
---

Redirecting to the Quarto module. If you are not redirected within 3 seconds, click [here](https://hsma.co.uk/hsma_content/modules/current_module_details/8_modern_analytics.html) to go to the page.
